summary: Plan-only inventory assessment. No security-sensitive signal was present, and no merge action is recommended because the artifact lacks complete merge preflight proof, including hydrated comments/review-bot findings and a passed Codex /review. Each PR remains an independent maintainer-ready candidate outside a shared canonical family.

actions.reason: Independent PR with promising checks, but merge gates are incomplete in this plan artifact.
Independent low-signal docs PR; leave for maintainer review rather than closing or merging from this plan.
Independent higher-risk PR; keep it in maintainer review until full merge preflight is available.
Independent PR with a concrete failing check; keep for branch repair or maintainer review rather than merging from this plan.
Independent compatibility-sensitive feature PR; keep for complete review preflight rather than merging from this plan.
